0.q: During the period of air exposure, the stomatal apertures in the transgenic plants were 36%–44% lower than in wild-type seedlings; KcTrxf was shown to reduce the stomatal aperture by enhancing K+ efflux in guard cells.

2.q: KcCSD-transgenic plants better scavenged NaCl-elicited reactive oxygen species (ROS) compared to WT ones.
